Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The scratching of pencils echoes[n]throughout the art room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Let's see, on cleaning duty today is... Hiraga-senpai and you, {f 4 1}-kun. Thanks for your help![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}This room's smaller than my bedroom, but it's still surprisingly big.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}So, {f 4 1}-kun, I've decided that I'm going to study abroad.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}To be honest, I'm not really excited about it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}But I already told my teacher I don't want to be a doctor, so...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}D-Do you want something to drink? It's on me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Oh, I almost forgot. Did you want something cold, or maybe—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hiraga's voice sounds like it's[n]getting farther and farther away...[n]{f 1 1}
